scripts.build: pnpm package:source && pnpm exec lz-tool extra stellar verifiable-build --stellar-version 25.1.0 --archive .artifacts/.incoming/contracts-source.zip --package endpoint-v2:endpoint-v2/Cargo.toml --package uln302:message-libs/uln-302/Cargo.toml --package treasury:message-libs/treasury/Cargo.toml --package simple-message-lib:message-libs/simple-message-lib/Cargo.toml --package blocked-message-lib:message-libs/blocked-message-lib/Cargo.toml --package layerzero-views:layerzero-views/Cargo.toml --package upgrader:upgrader/Cargo.toml --package executor:workers/executor/Cargo.toml --package executor-helper:workers/executor-helper/Cargo.toml --package executor-fee-lib:workers/executor-fee-lib/Cargo.toml --package dvn:workers/dvn/Cargo.toml --package dvn-fee-lib:workers/dvn-fee-lib/Cargo.toml --package price-feed:workers/price-feed/Cargo.toml
scripts.build:contracts: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool stellar contract build
scripts.build:contracts:native: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --docker-platform native stellar contract build
scripts.lint: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo fmt -- --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings" stellar
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo clippy --all-targets --fix --allow-dirty --allow-staged && cargo fmt" stellar
scripts.package:source: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool extra stellar package-source --output .artifacts/.incoming/contracts-source.zip
scripts.test: pnpm resolve-dependencies && pnpm exec lz-tool --script "cargo nextest run" stellar
